title: metathelypteris uraiensis
intro: Metathelypteris uraiensis, also known as Urai's Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Metathelypteris uraiensis include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to lower blood pressure and reduce cholesterol levels. Metathelypteris uraiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal use.
